{{Infobox character
| name = Lirial Incarnation
| aliases = Incarnation of Lirial
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|white bolts}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lirial Incarnation|Incarnation of Lirial]], crystal Incarnation}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

''See also: [[Lirial Incarnation Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lirial]] [[Incarnation]] is a powerful being that embodies the nature of [[Lirial]]. Unlike other [[Incarnations]] that may focus on combat or judgment, this entity is characterized by an inclination toward seeking knowledge and reading. Physically, the [[Incarnation]] possesses a striking appearance, often described as having skin made of jewels or white crystal and wearing garments of silver wire. She may also feature a halo consisting of three whirling stars behind her head or a crystal head. Her abilities include the use of blinding white light, solid bolts of light, and star-nets to attack. She can also utilize crystal probes for communication or observation and possesses the ability to manifest a Gate, which serves as a portal to her [[Territory]]. The [[Incarnation]] can manipulate the environment by turning objects into crystal to immobilize others, though her physical form is fragile enough to shatter like glass upon impact. While she can appear dispassionate or focused on distant events through a crystal lens, she is also capable of calculated political maneuvering and sudden, deceptive strikes.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|As the crystal [[Incarnation]] of [[Lirial]], this entity manifests as a featureless white crystal statue wrapped in silver wire. While positioned behind [[Zakareth]] at the gates of [[Cana]], the figure utilized a crystal leg to deliver a stone-hard kick to [[Indirial]]. During combat, she held a crystal lens in her left hand and launched white bolts that [[Simon]] deflected with his blade. After attacking [[Leah]]'s crystal shield, the entity demonstrated a vulnerability by shattering into three pieces like thin glass upon striking cobblestones.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lirial Incarnation]] is a featureless statue made of white crystal wrapped in silver wire.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lirial]] is the [[Incarnation]] of [[Lirial]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lirial Incarnation]] was behind [[Zakareth]] at the gates of [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lirial Incarnation]] kicked [[Indirial]] with a foot hard as stone.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lirial Incarnation]] held a crystal lens in her left hand.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lirial Incarnation]] has a crystal leg.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] deflected the [[Lirial Incarnation]]'s white bolts with his blade.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lirial Incarnation]] is a crystal [[Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lirial Incarnation]] attacked [[Leah]]'s crystal shield.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lirial Incarnation]] can shatter into three pieces like thin glass upon hitting cobblestones.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“Give me your secrets, Incarnation of Lirial,” he said softly.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
